parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
header 微信扫码流程图
footer 总览

participant "用户" as User
participant "手机" as Phone
participant "微信" as WeChat
participant "商家" as Merchant

activate User #99FF99
User -> Phone : 1 输入手机密码
activate Phone #99FF99
Phone --> User : 2 打开手机
deactivate Phone

User -> WeChat : 3 打开微信扫一扫
activate WeChat #99FF99
WeChat --> User : 4 返回扫一扫界面
deactivate WeChat

User -> Merchant : 5.1 扫描商家收款码
activate Merchant #99FF99
Merchant -> Merchant : 5.2 生成收款二维码
Merchant --> WeChat : 5.3 返回收款二维码
deactivate Merchant

activate WeChat #99FF99
WeChat -> WeChat : 5.4 读取识别商家收款码
WeChat --> User : 6 提示输入微信支付密码

User -> WeChat : 7.1 输入微信支付密码
WeChat -> WeChat : 7.2 微信验证用户输入密码正确
WeChat -> Merchant : 7.3 向商家汇款
activate Merchant #99FF99
Merchant --> WeChat : 7.4 汇款成功
deactivate Merchant

WeChat --> User : 8 提示用户支付成功
deactivate WeChat
deactivate User

@enduml
```
